leadText: The Squirt Bottle (Japanese: ゼニガメじょうろ Zenigame Watering Can), formatted as SquirtBottle prior to Generation VI, is a Key Item introduced in Generation II. It is a watering can fashioned after a Squirtle.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Gold, Silver , Crystal , HeartGold, and SoulSilver , it allows the player to water a Sudowoodo posing as a tree that is blocking the path on Route 36 , prompting a battle with the wild Pokémon . After completing the battle, the Sudowoodo no longer obstructs the path to Ecruteak City . Additionally, in Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver, the Squirt Bottle is used to water Berry plants grown in the Berry Pots .
